title: いきなりピンチ！　チーム解散の危機

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after the Arima Kinen, Team Sirius embarks on a new
chapter...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What do you MEAN the team will be disbanded?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...beginning with a shock.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well you see, all of the other members have transferred out and only
you remain.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I'm afraid that one member is well below the team minimum.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If you aren't able to gather more members, I'm afraid we have little
choice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How could this happen overnight?! How could everyone be so cold?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How is it that you ARE so calm?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: The team that you inherited only yesterday is disintegrating!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Tazuna, is the disbandment immediate?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
No, I don't think so. This is actually the first time this has ever
happened...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But this extension is temporary at best. Without talking to the
higher-ups, I can't say how long you'll have.
choice_data_list: So time is of the essence.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'm sorry that it's come to this when you've just taken over...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Not a problem! We'll gather new team members posthaste!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I am a Mejiro! I'll prove just how much power there is to the Mejiro name!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Our team is looking for new recruits! Come sweat out your youth with
us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Rookie or veteran, we welcome all runners! We'll make you feel right
at home!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Come one, come all! Come and get your freshly picked carrots here.
They're cheap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Act now, and we'll throw in a special deal: free membership to Team
Sirius! Hey, you there! What say you?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ugh, why isn't there even a single taker?! Don't they know who's soliciting them?!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Well, consider the optics. This is a team run by a newbie trainer that
just lost all its members.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Well, consider the optics. This is a team run by a newbie trainer that
just lost all its members.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How do you even have time for that kind of logical thinking?! You
should be more worried!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I'm just as worried as you are.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I'm just as worried as you are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The old man trusted me to take care of his team. I can't let him down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The old man trusted me to take care of his team. I can't let him down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But as it stands, I don't think these methods will get us any shiny-eyed
new recruits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We need a new strategy. We need to focus on making this a team that
anyone would want to join.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, why don't we give our minds a break for now and get
some training in?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, why don't we give our minds a break for now and get
some training in?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I... suppose you're right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We can't let this occupy all of our time when we have races to win.
...I'll go get ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our first goal is to win the spring Tenno Sho at the end of April.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our first goal is to win the spring Tenno Sho at the end of April.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The 3,200 meter race will be a serious test of endurance. I decide to
work on improving her form to draw out her best performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The 3,200 meter race will be a serious test of endurance. I decide to
work on improving her form to draw out her best performance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Coming out of that corner, try to shift more energy into your left leg.
Imagine kicking away the ground with your left foot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Okay, understood.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Focus on that for another three laps. We'll call it a day after that.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Focus on that for another three laps. We'll call it a day after that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Only three more laps?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
You're still not used to this form, so we need to be careful not to
strain your legs.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
You're still not used to this form, so we need to be careful not to
strain your legs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, I see how that could be a concern.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Let me know if you have any objections, okay? I don't want to force
you to do things you disagree with.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Let me know if you have any objections, okay? I don't want to force
you to do things you disagree with.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh no, your reasoning is sound. I have no qualms with your judgment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Speaking as if to reassure me, Mejiro McQueen takes to the track
once more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Despite it all, I still sense a tinge of dissatisfaction.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: She doesn't seem that convinced...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Is my instruction what's lacking, or is it just a matter of building trust?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And we still have recruiting to worry about. This has turned into some
ordeal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And we still have recruiting to worry about. This has turned into some
ordeal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give myself a good slap on the cheeks and shift my gaze back to
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give myself a good slap on the cheeks and shift my gaze back to
McQueen.
